fields.title: [memory-api][move-kernel] Emit tracing spans for journaled move execution
[memory-api][move-kernel] Emit tracing spans for journaled move execution

fields.validation_summary: Added tracing spans/events to memory-api move-kernel execute/resume/rollback while preserving MoveJournal phase_timings_ms. Focused validation passed for execute_move_with_journal_moves_ticket_between_stores and rollback_move_with_journal_restores_source_location, followed by full cargo test -p ticket-api (94 passed).
